customerProfiles.name: Elena Papadopoulos
customerProfiles.review: The sunsets in Santorini were beyond magical. Every corner is postcard-worthy!

customerProfiles.name: Ravi Mehta
customerProfiles.review: Exploring the Acropolis and local cuisine was a lifetime experience.

customerProfiles.name: Sofia Martinez
customerProfiles.review: Warm people, amazing beaches, and delicious food — Greece stole my heart!
